title: S Works Missing Songs
wikitext:
[]: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Thu Jul 09, 2020 3:34 pm I've noticed, with tracks like "A Cruel Angel's Thesis", there's no vocal take, nor full instrumental version... Why aren't they on there? also, besides that, are there any other songs missing on s2 works? im trying to listen to everything. i like eva music, what can i say edit: i realize now that tracks missing aren't composed by him, and below, i've made a compilation of tracks (with their respective albums, track numbers, etc.) that aren't composed by shiro, as to finish off the soundtrack.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jul 09, 2020 5:26 pm It's called "S^2 Works" for "Shiro Sagisu", so the set only includes pieces that Sagisu composed, arranged, or both. Hence only the versions of Cruel Angel's Thesis, FMttM, etc., that Sagisu worked on will be there. Just for the future, please make use of the "Edit" function instead of double-posting. Double-posting is acceptable under specific circumstances (bumping a thread about your original work to showcase a new installment, for instance), but not when you simply want to add something to your post that you forgot.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Thu Jul 09, 2020 7:39 pm Reichu wrote: It's called "S^2 Works" for "Shiro Sagisu", so the set only includes pieces that Sagisu composed, arranged, or both. Hence only the versions of Cruel Angel's Thesis, FMttM, etc., that Sagisu worked on will be there. Just for the future, please make use of the "Edit" function instead of double-posting. Double-posting is acceptable under specific circumstances (bumping a thread about your original work to showcase a new installment, for instance), but not when you simply want to add something to your post that you forgot.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 10, 2020 12:55 am You find out by comparing the track list for S2 Works to the track lists for the various other albums, I suppose!

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Sun Aug 23, 2020 6:04 pm Reichu wrote: You find out by comparing the track list for S2 Works to the track lists for the various other albums, I suppose!

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 23, 2020 6:20 pm No download link to the music, as that's against our rules, but if you would like to share a "text only" version of the playlist, it would be lovely to see the results of your research that way .

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Sun Aug 23, 2020 6:31 pm Reichu wrote: No download link to the music, as that's against our rules, but if you would like to share a "text only" version of the playlist, it would be lovely to see the results of your research that way .

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Sun Aug 23, 2020 7:17 pm i forgot to check eva:death, will add anything i find to disc 8 and edit list i made in last post

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Aug 24, 2020 3:36 am S² Works is specifically S hiro S agisu's music and arrangements (hence "S²"). The tracks are those not composed or arranged by him.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Mon Aug 24, 2020 6:31 am pwhodges wrote: S² Works is specifically S hiro S agisu's music and arrangements (hence "S²"). The tracks are those not composed or arranged by him.

[]: Re: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Aug 24, 2020 6:54 am I was confused too -- I provided that information in the second post of the thread.

[]: Re: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Mon Aug 24, 2020 7:39 am Reichu wrote: I was confused too -- I provided that information in the second post of the thread.

[]: Re: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Aug 24, 2020 9:07 am By my post made without consideration to Reichu's above. My bad.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 25, 2020 6:43 am "Shiro Sagisu - [EVANGELION : DEATH #08] Ware he no, Namida" isn't in the S² Works, despite it being a Shiro Sagisu original for Evangelion? Weird... I'm glad you found the exact recordings for the classical music used in the TV Series. (That's what those are, right?) I've been meaning to find the "Eva version" of Beethoven's 9th specifically.

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 25, 2020 7:10 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: "Shiro Sagisu - [EVANGELION : DEATH #08] Ware he no, Namida" isn't in the S² Works, despite it being a Shiro Sagisu original for Evangelion? Weird...

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Tue Aug 25, 2020 8:15 am yea i messed up. realized that today. it's hard tho, cut me some slack. i have like 200, 300 songs to compare

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Tue Aug 25, 2020 8:27 am Reichu wrote: No, it's there. Track 26 on disc 5. Glitz2hard's listing includes other songs that are S2 Works, now that I look at it. "THE HEADY FEELING OF FREEDOM" is 5-05. "Good, or Don't Be" is 5-09. "THE SORROW OF LOSING THE OBJECT OF ONE'S DEPENDENCE II" is 1-32. You never knew about the "Addition" album?

[]: Re: Why is S² Works missing songs?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Aug 25, 2020 8:50 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I'm glad you found the exact recordings for the classical music used in the TV Series. (That's what those are, right?) I've been meaning to find the "Eva version" of Beethoven's 9th specifically.

[]: Re: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Tue Aug 25, 2020 8:57 am If you're looking for Eva Classical, there's a REALLY good live album called Evangelion Symphony. It has a lot of extended (read: almost sort of full) pieces, not just the parts from the show. Also, on Evangelion: Death, there's a forty minute bonus track (also on my playlist) that's just some choral piece.

[]: Re: S² Works "Missing" Songs             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 25, 2020 9:12 am glitz2hard : You're double-posting, so I assume you haven't looked at the Forum Rules yet. Forum Rules wrote: Use the edit button if you need to add to a prior post rather than double posting.
